# Generated by ollama (starcoder2)
# Prompt: Write an ARM template for a complete Azure web application stack (App Service, SQL Database, Storage Account). Focus on core resources and connectivity. We'll add diagnostic settings and monitoring in the next iteration after we verify the basic setup works.
# Category: cloud_monitoring

---
$vmAdminUsername = "vmAdmin"
$adminPassword = "<PASSWORD>!" |{ "value": <PASSWORD>" }|
$webappDnsPrefix = $webAppname |{ "value": "$webAppname" }|
$appServiceName = $webappDnsPrefix |{ "value": "[concat($webappDnsPrefix,'appservice')]"}|
$websiteAdminUsername = 'websiteadmin' |{ "value":  "websiteadmin" }|
$websiteAdminPassword = '<PASSWORD>!!!' |{ "value": "$websiteAdminPassword" }|
$sqlserverName = $webAppname |{ "value": "[concat($webappDnsPrefix, '.database.windows.net')]" }|
$dbUsername = 'dbUser' |{ "value":  "dbUser" }|
$dbPassword = '<PASSWORD>!!!' |{ "value": "$dbPassword" }|
$storageAccountName = $webAppname |{ "value": "[concat($webappDnsPrefix,'storage')]" }|
---
# Resource Group
resourceGroup |{ "apiVersion": 1, "type": "Microsoft.Resources/resourceGroups", "properties": {}, "dependsOn": [], "location": "$vmLocation", "name": $RGname |{ "value": "[concat('RG-','WebAPP-RG')]" }|}

# Azure SQL Server
sqlServer |{ "apiVersion": 1, "type": "Microsoft.Sql/servers", "properties": { "administratorLogin": "$sqlAdminName", "version": "12.0" }, "dependsOn": [], "location": $sqlServerLocation |{ "value": "[parameters('sqlServerLocation')]" }|, "name": $sqlserverName |{ "value":  "[concat($webappDnsPrefix,'sql')]" }|}
sqlFirewall |{ "apiVersion": 1,"type": "Microsoft.Sql/servers/firewallRules", "dependsOn": [],"properties": { "startIpAddress": "0.0.0.0", "endIpAddress": "0.0.0.0" }, "name": $sqlserverName |{ "value": "[parameters('sqlserverName')]" }|, "location": $sqlServerLocation |{ "value": "[parameters('sqlServerLocation')]" }|}
# Azure SQL Database
sqlDB |{  "apiVersion": 1,"type": "Microsoft.Sql/servers/databases", "dependsOn": [],"properties": { }, "name": $sqldbName |{ "value":  "[concat($webappDnsPrefix,'db')]" }|, "location": $sqlServerLocation |{ "value": "[parameters('sqlServerLocation')]" }|}
# Storage Account
storageAccount |{ "apiVersion": 1,"type": "Microsoft.Storage/storageAccounts", "dependsOn": [],"properties": { }, "name": $storageAccountName |{ "value":  "[parameters('storageAccountName')]" }|, "location": $vmLocation |{ "value":  "[parameters('vmLocation')]" }|}
sqldbUser |{ "apiVersion": 1, "type": "Microsoft.Sql/servers/databaseUsers", "dependsOn": [],"properties": { }, "name": $dbUsername |{ "value": "$dbUsername" }|, "location": $sqlServerLocation |{ "value": "[parameters('sqlServerLocation')]" }|}
# SQL User and Password Policy for Sql Database
sqlPasswordPolicy |{  "apiVersion":1,"type":"Microsoft.Sql/servers/databaseUserCredentials", "dependsOn":[],"properties":{"password":"$<PASSWORD>"}, "name":"$dbUsername","location":"[parameters('sqlServerLocation')]"}|
sqlAdminLogin |{  "apiVersion":1, "type":"Microsoft.Sql/servers/administrators", "dependsOn":[], "properties":{"login":"","azureADOnlyAuthentication":false,"sid":""},"name":"$sqlAdminName","location":"[parameters('sqlServerLocation')]"}|
# Application Insights
appInsights |{  "apiVersion":1, "type":"Microsoft.Insights/components", "dependsOn":[],"name":"$aiName","properties":{"ApplicationType":"Web", "RequestSource":"PublicWeb" },"location":"[parameters('aiLocation')]"}|
# App Service Plan
appServicePlan |{  "apiVersion":2,"type":"Microsoft.Web/serverfarms", "dependsOn":[], "name":"$aspName","properties":{"Reserved":false},"location":"[parameters('aiLocation')]"}|
# VM Resource - OS and Image to be installed
vmResource |{ "apiVersion":1, "type":"Microsoft.Compute/virtualMachines/extensions", "dependsOn":["[resourceId('Microsoft.Compute/virtualMachines', parameters('vmName'))]"],"name":"$vmAdminUsername","properties":{"publisher":"Microsoft.Azure.ActiveDirectory","settings":{"adminUsername":"$vmAdminUsername","adminPassword":{"value": "$<PASSWORD>"}},"type":"CustomScript"},"location":"[parameters('aiLocation')]"}|
# OS and Web Server Configuration
webServerConfiguration |{  "apiVersion":2,"type":"Microsoft.Web/sites/config", "dependsOn":[], "name":"$webappDnsPrefix","properties":{"alwaysOn":false, "appSettings": [],"connectionStrings": [{ "connectionString": "[concat('Name=Data Source=', $sqldbName, ';Initial Catalog=', $dbUsername)]", "type": 0 }]}}|
# Web App resource
webapp |{  "apiVersion":2,"type":"Microsoft.Web/sites", "dependsOn":[], "name":"$webappDnsPrefix","properties":{"defaultHostName": "[]"},"location":"[parameters('aiLocation')]"}|
# Web App Connection String for SQL Database
sqlDBConnectionString |{   "apiVersion":1, "type":"Microsoft.Web/hostingEnvironments/config", "dependsOn":[],"name":"$sqldbName |{ "value": "[concat($webappDnsPrefix,'db')]" }|, "location":"[parameters('aiLocation')]"}|
# Web App Connection String for Azure SQL Database
sqlDBConnectionString2 |{   "apiVersion":1,"type":"Microsoft.Web/sites/config", "dependsOn":[],"name":"$sqldbName |{ "value":  "[parameters('sqlServerLocation')]" }|, "location":"[parameters('aiLocation')]"}|
---

# WebApp Admin Login Details:
Username:$websiteAdminUsername
Password:$<PASSWORD>

# App Service SQL Connection String and User

ConnectionString1:$sqlserverName |{ "value":  "[concat('Server=', $sqldbName, ';Database=master;Integrated Security=False;User ID=$dbUsername; Password=$db<PASSWORD>')]" }|

ConnectionString2:$sqldbName |{ "value": "[concat('Server=', $sqlserverName, ';Database=master;Integrated Security=False;User ID=$dbUsername;Password=$dbPassword')]" }|
